article.description: — Austin Reaves scored 38 points, Luka Doncic added 35 points and 11 assists in his third meeting with his former team, and the Lakers spoiled Anthony Davis' return to Los Angeles with a 129-119 victory over the Dallas Mavericks on Friday night.
article.headline: Reaves scores 38 points, Luka adds 35, Lakers hold off Mavs 129-119 in Anthony Davis' LA return

images.caption: Austin Reaves unleashes 38 points while Luka Doncic adds 35 in the Lakers' 129-119 win over the Mavericks.
images.name: Reaves, Doncic combine for 73 as Lakers top Mavs

article.linkText: Reaves scores 38 points, Luka adds 35, Lakers hold off Mavs 129-119 in Anthony Davis' LA return
article.story: LOS ANGELES -- — Austin Reaves scored 38 points, Luka Doncic added 35 points and 11 assists in his third meeting with his former team, and the Lakers spoiled Anthony Davis' return to Los Angeles with a 129-119 victory over the Dallas Mavericks on Friday night. Davis had 13 points and five rebounds while on a minutes restriction in his first game in Los Angeles since the Lakers traded him for Doncic 10 months ago. Reaves scored 19 points and Doncic added 17 in an impressive second half, allowing the Lakers to hold on for their sixth consecutive victory. They also swept four games of NBA Cup group play, earning a home quarterfinal. LeBron James scored 13 points after managing just two in the first half, but he hit a decisive 3-pointer with two minutes to play. Reaves hit six 3-pointers and Doncic made four. P.J. Washington scored 22 points and Ryan Nembhard added 17 for Dallas, while Max Christie scored 13 points against his former team. Rookie Cooper Flagg had 13 points, 11 assists and seven rebounds, but the Mavericks lost for the fifth time in six games despite a noticeable improvement on their recent play with Davis' return. Dallas had a narrow lead with less than eight minutes to play, but the Lakers held the Mavs without a field goal for nearly four minutes while making a 13-1 run that included big baskets from Reaves and Deandre Ayton, who finished with 17 points. In his return from a 14-game absence with a strained calf, Davis received a loud, warm reception from Lakers fans when introduced with the Mavs’ starters. The big man is beloved in LA after teaming up with James for a championship run during 5 1/2 seasons with the Lakers. Up next Mavericks: At Los Angeles Clippers on Saturday night. Lakers: Host New Orleans on Sunday night. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/NBA

images.name: Luka Doncic [1296x729]

images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics celebrates after scoring against the Dallas Mavericks during the second quarter at TD Garden on March 06, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 and Devin Vassell #24 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the New Orleans Pelicans on January 25, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Led by Victor Wembanyama, the Spurs continue to see their NBA championship odds shorten.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (2) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Even after a rough stretch of games, the Thunder remain the heavy favorites to win the NBA championship.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Adding James Harden to a talented roster with the likes of Donovan Mitchell gives the Cavs a higher upside this season.
images.name: Donovan Mitchell [1296x729]

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics now have shorter odds to win the NBA title than the Spurs, Rockets, Knicks and Pistons.
images.name: Jaylen Brown [1296x729]

images.alt: Jamal Murray #27 of the Denver Nuggets dribbles the ball during the game against the Dallas Mavericks on January 14, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas.
images.caption: Jamal Murray has led the Nuggets while Nikola Jokic recovers from injury.

videos.description: Dallas Mavericks vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights
videos.headline: Dallas Mavericks vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Dallas Mavericks vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic drives between two defenders and tosses it up to LeBron James, who throws down a reverse jam.
videos.headline: Doncic splits defense and finds LeBron for reverse alley-oop slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Doncic splits defense and finds LeBron for reverse alley-oop slam) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic beats a double team and connects with Deandre Ayton for a Lakers alley-oop.
videos.headline: Doncic feeds Ayton on the lob for the Lakers

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Doncic feeds Ayton on the lob for the Lakers) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic drives straight to the rack for a smooth layup for the Lakers.
videos.headline: Luka Doncic glides in for a Lakers layup

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka Doncic glides in for a Lakers layup) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Klay Thompson kicks it out to Brandon Williams, who cashes in on a 3-pointer from the wing for the Mavericks.
videos.headline: Klay Thompson finds Brandon Williams for a 3-pointer

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Klay Thompson finds Brandon Williams for a 3-pointer) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic drops in a tough 3-pointer with Klay Thompson in his face for the Lakers.
videos.headline: Luka drops in tough trey over Klay

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka drops in tough trey over Klay) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.description: LeBron James passes out to Austin Reaves for a Lakers 3-pointer.
videos.headline: LeBron finds Reaves for a 3-pointer

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LeBron finds Reaves for a 3-pointer) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Cooper Flagg passes to Anthony Davis, who gets to the rack for a big one-handed jam for Dallas.
videos.headline: Flagg finds AD for a big Mavs dunk

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Flagg finds AD for a big Mavs dunk) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Jaxson Hayes glides in for a big Lakers jam
videos.headline: Jaxson Hayes glides in for a big Lakers jam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jaxson Hayes glides in for a big Lakers jam) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Cooper Flagg pulls up from top of the key and drains the 3-pointer for the Mavericks.
videos.headline: Cooper Flagg drains a 3-pointer for Dallas

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cooper Flagg drains a 3-pointer for Dallas) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Austin Reaves rattles in a tough 3-pointer for the Lakers in the third quarter.
videos.headline: Reaves cooks up a tough 3 for the Lakers

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Reaves cooks up a tough 3 for the Lakers) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.description: LeBron James tries to drop in a layup, but P.J. Washington swats his attempt away.
videos.headline: P.J. Washington elevates to deny LeBron

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (P.J. Washington elevates to deny LeBron) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Austin Reaves flies to the rim and drops in a tough and-1 for the Lakers.
videos.headline: Reaves banks in and-1 for the Lakers

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Reaves banks in and-1 for the Lakers) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Austin Reaves shows off the handles en route to dropping in a slick layup for the Lakers.
videos.headline: Reaves razzle dazzles his way in for a tough layup

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Reaves razzle dazzles his way in for a tough layup) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Austin Reaves crashes Luka Doncic's postgame interview to poke fun at how many more dunks he has than Luka.
videos.headline: Reaves crashes Luka's interview: 'I currently have more dunks than him'

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Interview (Reaves crashes Luka's interview: 'I currently have more dunks than him') 2025/11/29
